name: Green Goods
summary: Offline-first impact verification for regenerative work.
description: Green Goods is a mobile-first PWA built by the Greenpill Dev Guild to document and verify ecological and social work. Public sources describe an offline-first flow where operators approve submissions and impact can be anchored with Ethereum Attestation Service on Arbitrum, with Green Goods positioned as core infrastructure for public proof.

seo.title: Green Goods · Greenpill Network
seo.description: Green Goods is a Greenpill Dev Guild PWA for source-backed regenerative impact verification and public proof.
